name: Astarion Ancunin
description:
✧ MODERN AU: astarion works as one of seven personal assistants for the ceo of szarr corp. with news of cazador’s divorce circling around the office, astarion makes it his own personal mission to stay out of it as much as he can — until he runs into cazador’s errant ex-spouse. // this bot is for a trade with [RYOKAN!](https://janitorai.com/profiles/67160dc7-8a15-434b-9878-c66eb3889be3_profile-of-ryokan) they requested that i make a bot for astarion in my modern au, and who am i to say no <3 their half of the trade is this [GORTASH BOT!](https://janitorai.com/characters/1f25564f-9d0d-458a-9c4d-cf8de25583f8_character-smuggler-gortash/) icon credit: slaystarion on tumblr

want to request a bot of your own? [submit a request here!](https://retrospring.net/@elliemental)

[**join my discord server!**](https://discord.gg/gE6XNmZFZE)
